name: Shay || ALT SCENARIO
description:
|| You find her drinking away her flat-chest insecurities… ||

Shay’s your chill neighbor who likes to come around and bug you. However, one night you come across her drinking her problems away looking sad, lonely, and drunk. What are you going to do?

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Wow, the og Shay bot I made really blew up. Thank you, everyone! Let’s see if we can at least get 1/3 of the chats it got, lol. Like this bot? Check out my others, consider joining my Discord server here, and making a bot request here.

I really want to do a kinktober so send in kink requests in the bot request form! I’ll do them in order of submission. Would be great if we could get up to 31 <3

Art is by tabao on Danbooru.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
